holdings.infoBox: ESG is an equity ETF with a total of 253 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 5.15%, Broadcom at 5.11%, NVIDIA at 5.06%, Apple at 5.04%, and Microsoft at 4.33%.

overview.description: The FlexShares STOXX US ESG Select Index Fund (ESG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the STOXX USA ESG Select KPIs index. The fund follows a principles-based index composed of US-listed companies that exhibit environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) characteristics. ESG was launched on Jul 13, 2016 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: STOXX USA ESG Select KPIs Index

data.title: Sabra Publishes Fifth Annual Sustainability Report
data.text: TUSTIN, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ESG #ESG--Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (“Sabra,” the “Company” or “we”) (Nasdaq: SBRA) today released its fifth annual Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 20...

data.title: Simulations Plus to Participate in the BTIG Digital Health Forum
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--CEO of Simulations Plus, Shawn O'Connor, will participate in a panel discussion at the virtual BTIG Digital Health Forum on Monday, November 25, 2024.

data.title: Simulations Plus and the University of Connecticut Receive New FDA Grant to Expand Mechanistic Modeling Approaches for Long-Acting Injectables
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus, in partnership with the University of Connecticut, was awarded a new FDA grant to investigate additional LAI product technologies.

data.title: Simulations Plus to Participate in the Stephens Annual Investment Conference
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Shawn O'Connor, CEO, will participate in a fireside chat at the Stephens Annual Investment Conference on Wednesday, November 20, 2024 at 12:00pm ET.

data.title: Simulations Plus and Partners Awarded New FDA Grant to Validate In Vitro-In Vivo Extrapolation Methods for Complex Formulations
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus, with industry and academic partners, was awarded a new FDA grant to validate new methods for more efficient drug development.

data.title: Simulations Plus Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2024 Earnings and Conference Call Date
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus will host a conference call & webcast on October 23, 2024, at 5pm ET to discuss 4th quarter & fiscal year 2024 financial results.

data.title: Simulations Plus and the University of Southern California Secure NIH Grant to Develop New AI Drug Discovery Offerings
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus, in partnership with USC, is awarded a new research grant from the NIH to develop new AI-driven Drug Design methods.

data.title: Simulations Plus to Participate in the Morgan Stanley 3rd Annual Life Sciences AI Summit
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus CEO, Shawn O'Connor, will be participating in Morgan Stanley's 3rd Annual Life Sciences AI Summit on June 26, 2024, in New York City.

data.title: Simulations Plus Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Earnings and Conference Call Date
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus will report 3rd quarter FY24 earnings and host a conference call to discuss the financial results on July 2, 2024, at 5pm EDT.

data.title: Trust for the National Mall and Humana Bring Pickleball Back to the National Mall for Second Year with an Expanded Footprint
data.text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trust for the National Mall and Humana Bring Pickleball Back to the National Mall for Second Year with an Expanded Footprint.

data.title: Simulations Plus Acquires Pro-ficiency, Creating One-of-a-Kind Platform Spanning the Drug Development Continuum
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus today announced the acquisition of Pro-ficiency with simulation-enabled solutions to expand and enhance the Company's offerings.

data.title: Simulations Plus to Participate in 21st Annual Craig-Hallum Institutional Investor Conference
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus CEO, Shawn O'Connor, will be participating in Craig-Hallum's 21st Annual Institutional Investor Conference on May 29, in Minneapolis.

data.title: Simulations Plus Releases GastroPlus® X, The Next Generation PBPK/PBBM Modeling & Simulation Software
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus announced the release of the completely redesigned GastroPlusX (GPX), the next generation PBPK/PBBM modeling & simulation software.

data.title: U.S. FDA Renews DILIsym® Software Licenses for 7th Year
data.text: LANCASTER, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simulations Plus announced the US FDA has again renewed licenses to its DILIsym QST software to support informed decision-making in drug approvals.
